Apex Trail Runner Pro

★★★★☆ 4.2 (128 reviews)
$29.99 $49.99
You save $20.00 (40% off)

Built for rugged terrain, the Apex Trail Runner Pro features aggressive grip, waterproof uppers, and responsive cushioning. Whether you're tackling mountain trails or muddy paths, these shoes deliver comfort and stability mile after mile.

  • Waterproof GORE-TEX membrane
  • Vibram Megagrip outsole
  • EVA midsole with rock plate
  • Reinforced toe cap
  • Reflective details for low-light visibility
🚚 Free Shipping 🔃 30-Day Returns 🔒 Secure Checkout
